name: Hawk Protection Systems, Inc.
summary: Hawk Protection Systems, Inc. engages in the research, development, and engineering of various security products and systems for use by government, military, and law enforcement agencies worldwide, as well as commercial security professionals. Its products include air jet explosives trace detector, the detection system built for mass simultaneous detection; detection and surveillance robot, which is a heavy duty remote controlled robot that is used as surveillance, explosives detection, and rescue mission device; and DETECTrack system, which creates geographical map of railroad tracks comprising proprietary explosives sensors installed along the tracks. The company offers engineering and consulting services for companies in the security and defense sector. It operates in the protection and security industry. The company was founded by John D. Altes and is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.
